description_long: This house features a steeply pitched red gable roof with overlapping shingles and a prominent stone chimney. The exterior walls are a mix of rustic stonework and dark vertical wooden planks, giving it a cozy, cottage-like appearance. A small covered porch with a gabled roof and wooden columns marks the main entrance, which is adorned with a decorative round window above the door. Red shrubbery lines the base of the house, adding a touch of color and landscaping. The windows are few and asymmetrically placed, with a notable circular window on the front facade. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and storybook architectural influences, suitable for a quaint urban neighborhood.
description: A charming stone-and-wood house with a steep red gable roof, a covered porch, and decorative landscaping. The design features a mix of rustic and storybook elements, highlighted by a prominent chimney and round window.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall stone chimney, dark wooden siding, and red shrubs along the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, round window above the door, and the main entryway with columns.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full stone wall, red shingle roof, and partial view of the porch.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stone gable end, chimney, and dark wooden siding.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a prominent round window
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with gabled roof, wooden columns, steps, and a decorative round window above the main door
